The Process

How Commercial Lockout Service Works

Simple, transparent, and fast. Here's what to expect when you call.

1

Call With Your Business Details

Tell us your business type, lock type if you know it, and exact location. We give you an upfront price and dispatch a commercial locksmith to your St. Louis business immediately.

2

Professional Commercial Entry

Our technician arrives in 20-30 minutes with specialized commercial entry tools. We open panic bars, mortise locks, electronic systems, and high-security cylinders without damaging your door, frame, or glass.

3

Back in Business

Once inside, we can address the root cause — extract a broken key, repair a faulty lock, cut new employee keys, or recommend a master key system to prevent future lockouts.

Customer Reviews

5-Star Rated For
Commercial Lockout Service

See Our Reviews on Google→

Marcus T.

9 April 2026

My closing manager got locked out of the restaurant on a Saturday morning before brunch. Nonstop dispatched a tech within the hour, opened the back service door, and even rekeyed the lock right after since the keys were missing. Saved our weekend service.

Sandra K.

22 March 2026

Sunday emergency lock change at our dental office. Three doors + master key in 2 hrs. Excellent.

E

Eric B.

12 October 2024

Tenant lockout at 6am before a client meeting. Nonstop got there in 22 min, suite open before the client arrived. Clutch.

Lisa V.

19 January 2026

Boutique on Manchester Road needed an emergency lock change after a smash-and-grab attempt on the back door. Nonstop came within the hour, installed a heavy-duty commercial deadbolt and reinforced the strike plate. Felt secure again by closing time. Couldn't ask for better.

A

Andrew M.

12 December 2025

Run a warehouse and a former employee took off with the office keys. Nonstop came out, rekeyed the office plus the front and dock doors, set up a clean restricted key system. Done in one afternoon visit. Professional and fairly priced.

About This Service

Professional Commercial Lockout Service In St. Louis

A commercial lockout can bring your entire operation to a halt. Whether you are a shop owner standing outside your storefront at 6am, a restaurant manager locked out before the dinner rush, or an office tenant who cannot access the building after hours, every minute locked out costs you money. Nonstop Lock & Key provides professional commercial lockout service throughout the St. Louis metro area, dispatching mobile locksmiths who specialize in commercial-grade lock hardware and can get your doors open without damaging the lock, frame, or glass.

Commercial locks are built differently from residential hardware. Panic bars, mortise locks, electronic access systems, keypad entries, Adams Rite locks, and high-security cylinders all require specific tools and techniques to bypass safely. Our technicians carry the full range of commercial entry equipment and are trained on every major lock brand used in offices, retail stores, restaurants, warehouses, medical facilities, and multi-tenant buildings across the St. Louis area.

When you call us for a commercial lockout, we understand the urgency. A locked storefront means lost revenue. A locked office means employees standing around unable to work. A locked warehouse means deliveries backing up. That is why we prioritize commercial lockout calls and dispatch the nearest available technician to your location immediately. We provide an upfront price over the phone so you know exactly what the service will cost before we arrive.

Beyond just getting you back inside, we can address the root cause of the lockout on the spot. If a key broke in the lock, we extract it and cut a new one. If the lock mechanism failed, we repair or replace it during the same visit. If you need additional keys for employees, we cut them right there. We also offer master key systems, restricted-keyway upgrades, and access control solutions for businesses that want to prevent future lockout situations and better manage who has access to what. Call (314) 532-1112 any time, day or night.

FAQ

Commercial Lockout Service Questions Answered

Commercial lockout service starts at $75 in the St. Louis area. The final price depends on the type of lock, the complexity of the entry, and your location. We always provide an exact quote over the phone before dispatching so there are no surprises when our locksmith arrives.
